    Method
    Description
    <R> ChildContextOperation<R>
    ConcurrencyOperation.addItem(String name, Function<DurableContext,R> function, TypeToken<R> resultType, SerDes serDes)
    Adds a new item to this concurrency operation.

    BaseConcurrentOperation.branchInternal(String branchName, OperationSubType branchSubType, TypeToken<T> typeToken, SerDes serDes, Function<DurableContext,T> function)
     
    protected abstract <R> ChildContextOperation<R>
    ConcurrencyOperation.createItem(String operationId, String name, Function<DurableContext,R> function, TypeToken<R> resultType, SerDes serDes, DurableContextImpl parentContext)
    Creates a child context operation for a single item (branch or iteration).

    ParallelOperation.createItem(String operationId, String name, Function<DurableContext,R> function, TypeToken<R> resultType, SerDes serDes, DurableContextImpl parentContext)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected List<ChildContextOperation<?>>
    BaseConcurrentOperation.getBranches()
     
    protected List<ChildContextOperation<?>>
    ConcurrencyOperation.getChildOperations()
     
    protected Queue<ChildContextOperation<?>>
    BaseConcurrentOperation.getPendingQueue()
    Returns the pending queue of branches that have not yet been started.
    protected Set<ChildContextOperation<?>>
    BaseConcurrentOperation.getStartedBranches()
    Returns the set of branches that have been started (had execute() called).
    Methods in software.amazon.lambda.durable.operation with parameters of type ChildContextOperation
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    BaseConcurrentOperation.onChildContextComplete(ChildContextOperation<?> branch, boolean success)
    Called on the checkpoint processing thread when a branch's completionFuture completes.
    void
    ConcurrencyOperation.onItemComplete(ChildContextOperation<?> child)
    Called by a ChildContextOperation BEFORE it closes its child context.
